languages.text: "Ваш сиятельный предок, Себериан фон Валанциус уберег нас от ужасной участи безвестности и взял к себе на службу Первый Призыв. Он даровал нам хорошую форму и оружие, а еще передал валанциусский дар. От наших предков дошли истории как Вольный Торговец снимал дары со своего тела и вручал их наиболее отличившимся бойцам. Так они становились сильнее".

"Your illustrious ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, saved us from the terrible fate of obscurity and took the First Call-Up into his own service. He gave us good uniforms and weapons, and then there were the von Valancius gifts. Stories passed down from our ancestors tell of how the Rogue Trader removed these gifts from his own body and offered them to soldiers who had proven themselves better than all the rest. These boons made them even stronger."
languages.original_text: "Ваш сиятельный предок, Себериан фон Валанциус уберег нас от ужасной участи безвестности и взял к себе на службу Первый Призыв. Он даровал нам хорошую форму и оружие, а еще передал валанциусский дар. От наших предков дошли истории как Вольный Торговец снимал дары со своего тела и вручал их наиболее отличившимся бойцам. Так они становились сильнее".

traits.locale_text: "Your illustrious ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, saved us from the terrible fate of obscurity and took the First Call-Up into his own service. He gave us good uniforms and weapons, and then there were the von Valancius gifts. Stories passed down from our ancestors tell of how the Rogue Trader removed these gifts from his own body and offered them to soldiers who had proven themselves better than all the rest. These boons made them even stronger."

"Your illustrious ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, saved us from the terrible fate of obscurity and took the First Call-Up into his own service. He gave us good uniforms and weapons, and then there were the von Valancius gifts. Stories passed down from our ancestors tell of how the Rogue Trader removed these gifts from his own body and offered them to soldiers who had proven themselves better than all the rest. These boons made them even stronger."

"Legend has it that Seberian von Valancius saved the newly formed 32nd Regiment from the dire fate that awaited all Astra Militarum penal legions. By taking the First Call-Up into his own service, he did not let them perish. Moreover, he equipped the formerly poorly supplied prisoners at his own expense and he endowed them with von Valancius gifts — augments. An entire regiment, can you imagine? He changed our destiny."

"Your illustrious ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, saved us from the terrible fate of obscurity and took the First Call-Up into his own service. He gave us good uniforms and weapons, and then there were the von Valancius gifts. Stories passed down from our ancestors tell of how the Rogue Trader removed these gifts from his own body and offered them to soldiers who had proven themselves better than all the rest. These boons made them even stronger."

"Your illustrious ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, saved us from the terrible fate of obscurity and took the First Call-Up into his own service. He gave us good uniforms and weapons, and then there were the von Valancius gifts. Stories passed down from our ancestors tell of how the Rogue Trader removed these gifts from his own body and offered them to soldiers who had proven themselves better than all the rest. These boons made them even stronger."

"Your illustrious ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, saved us from the terrible fate of obscurity and took the First Call-Up into his own service. These boons made them even stronger."

languages.text: 「伝説によると、セベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウスは、アストラ・ミリタムの刑務連隊が直面していた絶望的な運命から、新しく編成された32連隊を救った。彼は最初の徴兵令を自分の下に引き入れ、彼らを死なせなかった。さらに、彼は、以前は補給が不足していた囚人を、自分の費用で装備し、ヴァランシウスの贈り物である強化を施した。一連隊まるごと、想像できるか？彼は私たちの運命を変えた」
languages.original_text: "Legend has it that Seberian von Valancius saved the newly formed 32nd Regiment from the dire fate that awaited all Astra Militarum penal legions. By taking the First Call-Up into his own service, he did not let them perish. Moreover, he equipped the formerly poorly supplied prisoners at his own expense and he endowed them with von Valancius gifts — augments. An entire regiment, can you imagine? He changed our destiny."

traits.locale_text: 「伝説によると、セベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウスは、アストラ・ミリタムの刑務連隊が直面していた絶望的な運命から、新しく編成された32連隊を救った。彼は最初の徴兵令を自分の下に引き入れ、彼らを死なせなかった。さらに、彼は、以前は補給が不足していた囚人を、自分の費用で装備し、ヴァランシウスの贈り物である強化を施した。一連隊まるごと、想像できるか？彼は私たちの運命を変えた。」

languages.text: « Votre illustre ancêtre, Seberian von Valancius, nous a sauvés d'un sort terrible et a pris les Premiers Mobilisés à son service. Il nous a donné des uniformes et des armes de bonne qualité, avant de nous conférer les dons des von Valancius. À en croire les récits de nos prédécesseurs, le libre-marchand s'est lui-même privé de ces dons, pris sur son propre corps, pour les offrir aux soldats les plus méritants. Ces avantages les rendaient encore plus forts. »
languages.original_text: "Your illustrious ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, saved us from the terrible fate of obscurity and took the First Call-Up into his own service. He gave us good uniforms and weapons, and then there were the von Valancius gifts. Stories passed down from our ancestors tell of how the Rogue Trader removed these gifts from his own body and offered them to soldiers who had proven themselves better than all the rest. These boons made them even stronger."

traits.locale_text: « Votre illustre ancêtre, Seberian von Valancius, nous a sauvés d'un sort terrible et a pris les Premiers Mobilisés à son service. Il nous a donné des uniformes et des armes de bonne qualité, avant de nous conférer les dons des von Valancius. À en croire les récits de nos prédécesseurs, le libre-marchand s'est lui-même privé de ces dons, pris sur son propre corps, pour les offrir aux soldats les plus méritants. Ces avantages les rendaient encore plus forts. »

languages.text: "Şanlı atanız Seberian von Valancius bizi unutulmanın o korkunç kaderinden kurtardı ve İlk Sevk Grubu'nu kendi hizmetine aldı. Bize iyi üniformalar ve silahlar verdi, sonra bir de von Valancius armağanları var. Atalarımızdan aktarılan hikâyeler, Hür Tacir'in bu armağanları kendi bedeninden çıkarışını ve herkesten daha iyi olduklarını kanıtlayan askerlere sunuşunu anlatır. Bu lütuflar onları daha da güçlendirmiş."
languages.original_text: "Your illustrious ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, saved us from the terrible fate of obscurity and took the First Call-Up into his own service. He gave us good uniforms and weapons, and then there were the von Valancius gifts. Stories passed down from our ancestors tell of how the Rogue Trader removed these gifts from his own body and offered them to soldiers who had proven themselves better than all the rest. These boons made them even stronger."

traits.locale_text: "Şanlı atanız Seberian von Valancius bizi unutulmanın o korkunç kaderinden kurtardı ve İlk Sevk Grubu'nu kendi hizmetine aldı. Bize iyi üniformalar ve silahlar verdi, sonra bir de von Valancius armağanları var. Atalarımızdan aktarılan hikâyeler, Hür Tacir'in bu armağanları kendi bedeninden çıkarışını ve herkesten daha iyi olduklarını kanıtlayan askerlere sunuşunu anlatır. Bu lütuflar onları daha da güçlendirmiş."

languages.text: "Euer berühmter Ahnherr, Seberian von Valancius, hat uns vor dem schrecklichen Schicksal der Dunkelheit bewahrt und die Erste Einberufung unter sein Kommando gestellt. Er gab uns gute Uniformen, Waffen und die Valancius-Gaben. Laut den Geschichten unserer Vorfahren entnahm der Freihändler diese Gaben seinem eigenen Leib und überließ sie den Soldaten, die sich im Kampf besonders hervorgetan hatten. Diese Gaben machten sie noch stärker."
languages.original_text: "Your illustrious ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, saved us from the terrible fate of obscurity and took the First Call-Up into his own service. He gave us good uniforms and weapons, and then there were the von Valancius gifts. Stories passed down from our ancestors tell of how the Rogue Trader removed these gifts from his own body and offered them to soldiers who had proven themselves better than all the rest. These boons made them even stronger."

traits.locale_text: "Euer berühmter Ahnherr, Seberian von Valancius, hat uns vor dem schrecklichen Schicksal der Dunkelheit bewahrt und die Erste Einberufung unter sein Kommando gestellt. Er gab uns gute Uniformen, Waffen und die Valancius-Gaben. Laut den Geschichten unserer Vorfahren entnahm der Freihändler diese Gaben seinem eigenen Leib und überließ sie den Soldaten, die sich im Kampf besonders hervorgetan hatten. Diese Gaben machten sie noch stärker."

languages.text: «Su ilustre antepasado, Seberian von Valancius, nos salvó de caer en el olvido y acogió a los primeros llamados en su servicio. Nos dio uniformes y armas dignos del nombre, fueron los dones de von Valancius. De generación en generación hemos transmitido el relato de cómo el Comerciante Independiente extrajo estos dones de su propio cuerpo y los ofreció a los soldados que habían demostrado ser mejores que los demás. Estos dones aumentaron aún más sus capacidades».
languages.original_text: "Your illustrious ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, saved us from the terrible fate of obscurity and took the First Call-Up into his own service. He gave us good uniforms and weapons, and then there were the von Valancius gifts. Stories passed down from our ancestors tell of how the Rogue Trader removed these gifts from his own body and offered them to soldiers who had proven themselves better than all the rest. These boons made them even stronger."

Nos dio uniformes y armas dignos del nombre, fueron los dones de von Valancius. Estos dones aumentaron aún más sus capacidades».

languages.text: “您那位显赫的先祖，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，把我们从湮没无闻的可怕命运中解救出来，将初代征召者纳入了自己麾下。他给了我们上好的军服和武器，还有那些冯·瓦兰修斯的馈赠。先人传下来的故事说，那位行商浪人会从自己身上取下这些馈赠，赐予那些实力冠绝全团的士兵。这些恩赐让他们变得更加勇猛。”
languages.original_text: "Your illustrious ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, saved us from the terrible fate of obscurity and took the First Call-Up into his own service. These boons made them even stronger."
